tiles.title: Ocean Blue Ceramic
tiles.description: Premium ceramic tile with deep ocean blue glaze finish. Perfect for bathrooms and swimming pools. The rich blue tone brings a sense of calm and luxury to any wet area.
tiles.creator: ArtTile Studio

tiles.title: Marble White Classic
tiles.description: Elegant white marble tile with natural grey veining. Brings luxury to any space. Each tile features unique natural patterns that make your floor or wall truly one of a kind.
tiles.creator: Marble Craft Co.

tiles.title: Terracotta Rustic
tiles.description: Handcrafted terracotta tile with rustic warm tones. Ideal for outdoor patios and kitchens. Each piece carries the authentic character of traditional craftsmanship.
tiles.creator: EarthTone Works

tiles.title: Geometric Black Gold
tiles.description: Stunning geometric pattern tile with black and gold finish. A bold statement for modern interiors. Makes any accent wall or floor the centerpiece of your space.
tiles.creator: DesignTile Lab

tiles.title: Forest Green Mosaic
tiles.description: Nature-inspired green mosaic tile. Perfect for accent walls and garden spaces. The small format pieces create a stunning visual texture that brings the outdoors in.
tiles.creator: GreenArt Tiles

tiles.title: Sandstone Beige
tiles.description: Natural sandstone finish tile with warm beige tones. Great for living rooms and hallways. The neutral palette works beautifully with any interior style.
tiles.creator: Stone Age Tiles

tiles.title: Midnight Black Glossy
tiles.description: High-gloss midnight black tile. Creates a dramatic and sophisticated atmosphere. Perfect for creating a luxurious statement in modern bathrooms and kitchens.
tiles.creator: Dark Matter Tiles

tiles.title: Vintage Floral Pattern
tiles.description: Charming vintage-style floral patterned tile. Adds character to kitchens and bathrooms. Each tile tells a story of timeless elegance and artistic craftsmanship.
tiles.creator: Heritage Tile House

tiles.title: Arctic White Subway
tiles.description: Classic subway tile in crisp arctic white. Timeless design for modern kitchens and bathrooms. The clean lines and bright finish create a fresh, open feeling.
tiles.creator: Metro Tile Co.

tiles.title: Rose Gold Metallic
tiles.description: Glamorous rose gold metallic tile. Perfect for luxury bathrooms and accent walls. The warm metallic sheen adds a touch of opulence to any interior.
tiles.creator: Luxe Tile Studio

tiles.title: Cobalt Blue Zellige
tiles.description: Handmade Moroccan zellige tile in rich cobalt blue. Each piece is unique with slight variations that add authentic character. A true artisan product.
tiles.creator: Marrakech Tiles

tiles.title: Concrete Grey Industrial
tiles.description: Raw concrete-look tile for industrial and minimalist interiors. Durable and stylish with an authentic urban feel that works perfectly in contemporary spaces.
tiles.creator: Urban Edge Tiles

tiles.title: Emerald Green Hexagon
tiles.description: Trendy hexagonal tiles in rich emerald green. Perfect for bathroom floors and feature walls. The geometric shape creates a stunning honeycomb pattern.
tiles.creator: Hex Tile Design

tiles.title: Sunshine Yellow Gloss
tiles.description: Bright and cheerful glossy yellow tile. Brings warmth and energy to any room. Perfect for creating a vibrant kitchen backsplash or playful bathroom.
tiles.creator: SunTile Works

tiles.title: Travertine Natural Stone
tiles.description: Authentic travertine stone tile with natural pores and earthy tones. Each tile is unique, displaying the natural beauty formed over thousands of years.
tiles.creator: Nature Stone Co.

tiles.title: Navy Blue Fish Scale
tiles.description: Elegant fish scale pattern in deep navy blue. A stunning choice for feature walls and bathroom floors. The scalloped shape creates a sophisticated ripple effect.
tiles.creator: WaveArt Tiles

tiles.title: Copper Penny Round
tiles.description: Small round copper-finish penny tiles. Creates beautiful mosaic-like surfaces with a warm metallic glow. Perfect for adding texture and depth to any surface.
tiles.creator: Penny Tile Studio

tiles.title: Sage Green Matte
tiles.description: Soft sage green matte finish tile. Perfect for creating a calm and natural atmosphere. This soothing colour pairs beautifully with natural wood and linen textures.
tiles.creator: Sage Studio Tiles

tiles.title: Onyx Black Marble
tiles.description: Luxurious black onyx marble tile with white veining. The epitome of elegance and sophistication. Creates a dramatic backdrop for any luxury interior.
tiles.creator: Onyx Premium Tiles

tiles.title: Pastel Pink Encaustic
tiles.description: Handcrafted encaustic cement tile in pastel pink. Adds a playful yet sophisticated touch to any space. The subtle pattern makes each installation truly unique.
tiles.creator: Cement Art House
